unit.note: Behavior-neutral spec/docs-only diff (spec.md + design doc + 2 planning files; zero product code touched). Full client vitest re-run as a regression guard: 2695/2695 across 295 files. client + server tsc --noEmit clean.

e2e.note: No product runtime surface changed; F0.5 surface=none, justified. No test reads spec.md's FR table (the doc-link tests use the survivor anchor #fr-0101, which is preserved).

smoke.note: Spec/docs-only change; no server/app started, no smoke surface.

surface_verification.justification: Behavior-neutral requirements-documentation restructure — edits only spec.md + planning/design docs; no API route, store, UI, or runtime code path changes, so there is no user-facing surface to drive. Verification is the meta-test suite (compliance parser-simulation + doc-consumer vitest + full client suite + git-scope check).

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Every behaviour this behavior-neutral spec-restructure introduces, from the iterate ACs: (1) 29 survivor rows + Area column + 14 area headers; (2) 37 folded IDs in FR-Fold-Map with 0 seen as active FR rows; (3) 0 orphan-causing folded-ID references; (4) Fold-Map completeness + provenance preserved; (5) doc-consumer tests green; (6) compliance parser sees exactly the 29 survivors; (7) historical files byte-untouched + zero code; (8) full client suite + typecheck green. 8 behaviours; all 8 tested locally; 0 untestable; 0 untested-testable.
